checkpoint.label: r7-3-9-config1-sprout-v2-success-20260513
checkpoint.description: Clean sprout V2 checkpoint: accepted R7-3.8 diffuse bake plus accepted R7-3.9 Config 1 current-view sprout reflection route.

visualAcceptance.roughnessOneObservation: At floor roughness 1, the floor outside the sprout patch has no reflection, so the sprout boundary is expected to look hard.
visualAcceptance.roughnessPointOneObservation: At floor roughness 0.1 and exactly 1000 spp, the sprout reflection blends into the surrounding floor as a complete ceiling-lamp reflection.
